title: ADVOCACY SERVICES - 211info
text: PENDLETON ADVOCACY CENTER ADVOCACY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter in Pendleton and Hermiston for survivors and their children, restraining order petition assistance, and help going to hospitals and court. 1103 SE Court Place Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic, sexual, or dating violence and/or stalking Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 276-3322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-3322 Hotline (800) 833-1161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Emergency Shelter: Morrow and Umatilla Counties All other services: Umatilla County Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Domestic Violence Shelters Protective/Restraining Orders Sexual Assault Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLASSES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - TRAINING WORKSHOPS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 24 HOUR CRISIS LINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PENDLETON ADVOCACY CENTER
